# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Tightened the drain harness at the PR port boundary by adding call recording to the mock pr_watch port and extending drain_harness unit scenarios to assert expected pr_open create_pr calls, pr_watch status/repo calls, reruns, failed log collection, and merge calls. Scenarios that abort before PR handling now assert zero PR invocations.","steps":[{"order":0,"status":"completed","description":"Reviewed existing drain harness, drain orchestration, and unit scenario coverage to identify where pr_open/pr_watch calls should be observed."},{"order":1,"status":"completed","description":"Added pr_watch mock call recording for repo_slug, pr_status, bot review checks, failed_run_logs, rerun_failed_runs, and merge_pr."},{"order":2,"status":"completed","description":"Added unit-test helpers and expectations that require PR open/watch machinery to be invoked for successful and PR-level failure paths, while confirming run-level abort paths do not invoke PR machinery."},{"order":3,"
